notes: Phone button layout + fullscreen polish (2026-06). Phone LANDSCAPE: the bottom tool bar (cbar) now sits at the bottom-right corner where the right thumb rests, instead of floating mid-screen, clear of the joystick/arrows. Object-add (📦) is now correctly PHONE-hidden in landscape too (the iPad rules were keyed on width alone, which a wide phone-landscape matched; now gated on the short edge ≥600 = a real tablet). Fullscreen (⛶) button is now PHONE-ONLY: shown on phones, removed from iPad. Fullscreen top-overlap: the top UI is shifted down by the safe-area inset while in fullscreen so it clears the notch (needs on-device confirmation). Note: iPhone Safari does not support page-fullscreen, so the button only appears where fullscreen actually works.
